parsed_json.communicative_function: Evoking latent potential and transformation through parallel natural metaphors extended to the soul
implicit_claims: Potential forms exist in dormant states (oak in acorn, bird in egg)
The soul contains an analogous latent higher nature capable of awakening
parsed_json.coherence_assessment: Internally coherent via consistent parallelism of emergence-from-potential across physical and spiritual domains
parsed_json.conditions_for_usefulness: Audience engages it metaphorically for reflection on growth, inspiration, or aesthetic appreciation
parsed_json.conditions_for_misleading: Taken as literal biological, ontological, or theological assertion rather than figurative expression
